lakeformation.resource.CfnAbout: The `AWS::LakeFormation::Resource` represents the data ( buckets and folders) that is being registered with AWS Lake Formation. During a stack operation, AWS CloudFormation calls the AWS Lake Formation [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lake-formation/latest/dg/aws-lake-formation-api-credential-vending.html

lakeformation.resource.ResourceArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource.

lakeformation.resource.RoleArn.Description: The IAM role that registered a resource.

lakeformation.resource.UseServiceLinkedR.Description: Designates a trusted caller, an IAM principal, by registering this caller with the Data Catalog.

lakeformation.resource.WithFederation.Description: Allows Lake Formation to assume a role to access tables in a federated database.
